Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests.extension

Class TestExtensionSignature

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.extension.TestExtensionSignature
public class TestExtensionSignature extends Object
Unit tests for the ExtensionSignature class.

      private void assertCorrectSignature(ExtensionSignature expected, ExtensionSignature actual, String functionalTypeImage)

    • disequality

      public void disequality()
      Ensures that equality is correctly computed. Actually, we are more interested in disequality, as equality is tested for each extension in the other tests.
